text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
This can't be real. This simple exercise routine
that make ya taller?!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: And it only takes thirty seconds a day?! I gotta test it out!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Okay, I got the first part down! Get ready for tall
Tama!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
The first pose supports your body so ya can
stretch your back out!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Next, you gotta strut like a model showin' off
their legs on a runway!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
And lastly, a big smile—'cause you're a bigger
person than the little things worryin' you!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
...But is this stuff really gonna make me taller?
Where's the logic?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Still, I can feel muscles I don't use much gettin' a
workout. Maybe these poses really are havin' an
effect... Okay, time for part two.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Although Tamamo Cross fails to grow an inch
even after making the exercises a daily habit, she
still learns a lot from the experience.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Hey, I'm still stuck at the same height!
